title: Brotein protein-bar schema — early protein-bar table draft
html:
Late-night Supabase schema sketch for the Brotein protein-bar catalog — columns for protein/calories/carbs/fats plus computed energy_profile, digestibility, overall_value and rank, seeded with ONE Bar / KIND / RXBAR / thinkThin / Quest / Barebells. First visible draft of anabolic scoring for packaged bars (sibling of the May 6 schema view).

brotein · supabase · anabolic scoring · bromenu
